Error Type Detection: Identify the specific validation error type\n17\t2. Context Analysis: Analyze the expected vs actual values to understand the mismatch\n18\t3. Pattern Matching: Detect common failure patterns (e.g., expired tokens, missing fields)\n19\t4. Actionable Recommendations: Provide specific steps to resolve the issue\n20\t5. Progressive Detail: Start with most likely causes, then less common ones\n21\t*/\n22\t\n23\t// =============================================================================\n24\t// COMPREHENSIVE SUGGESTION GENERATOR\n25\t// =============================================================================\n26\t\n27\t// GenerateComprehensiveSuggestions creates detailed, actionable suggestions for any validation error.\n28\t// This is the main entry point for enhanced suggestion generation and provides comprehensive\n29\t// recommendations based on error type, expected/actual values, and common failure patterns.\n30\t//\n31\t// Parameters:\n32\t//   - errorType: The type of validation error (e.g., \"status_code\", \"error_message\", \"content_type\")\n33\t//   - expected: The expected value (can be any type)\n34\t//   - actual: The actual value received (can be any type)\n35\t//   - context: Optional additional context about where/when the validation occurred\n36\t//\n37\t// Returns a slice of suggestion strings, ordered from most to least likely solution.\n38\t//\n39\t// Example usage:\n40\t//\n41\t//\tsuggestions := GenerateComprehensiveSuggestions(\"status_code\", 200, 404, \"GET /api/users/123\")\n42\t//\t// Returns:\n43\t//\t// [\"Verify the endpoint URL is correct\",\n44\t//\t//  \"Check if the resource ID or identifier exists\",\n45\t//\t//  \"Ensure the resource hasn't been deleted or moved\",\n46\t//\t//  \"Review API versioning (URL path may have changed)\",\n47\t//\t//  \"Check authentication credentials\"]\n48\tfunc GenerateComprehensiveSuggestions(errorType string, expected, actual interface{}, context string) []string {\n49\t\tvar suggestions []string\n50\t\n51\t\t// Normalize error type\n52\t\tnormalizedType := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(errorType))\n53\t\n54\t\tswitch normalizedType {\n55\t\tcase \"status_code\":\n56\t\t\tsuggestions = generateEnhancedStatusCodeSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n57\t\tcase \"error_message\", \"error_message_pattern\":\n58\t\t\tsuggestions = generateEnhancedErrorMessageSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n59\t\tcase \"content_type\":\n60\t\t\tsuggestions = generateEnhancedContentTypeSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n61\t\tcase \"status_code_range\":\n62\t\t\tsuggestions = generateEnhancedStatusCodeRangeSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n63\t\tcase \"cors_headers\":\n64\t\t\tsuggestions = generateCORSSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n65\t\tcase \"response_structure\":\n66\t\t\tsuggestions = generateResponseStructureSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n67\t\tcase \"response_body\":\n68\t\t\tsuggestions = generateResponseBodySuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n69\t\tcase \"response_encoding\":\n70\t\t\tsuggestions = generateResponseEncodingSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n71\t\tcase \"auth_headers\":\n72\t\t\tsuggestions = generateAuthHeaderSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n73\t\tcase \"custom_headers\":\n74\t\t\tsuggestions = generateCustomHeaderSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n75\t\tcase \"json_schema\":\n76\t\t\tsuggestions = generateJSONSchemaSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n77\t\tcase \"data_validation\", \"field_validation\":\n78\t\t\tsuggestions = generateDataValidationSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n79\t\tcase \"type_validation\":\n80\t\t\tsuggestions = generateTypeValidationSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n81\t\tcase \"timeout\":\n82\t\t\tsuggestions = generateTimeoutSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n83\t\tcase \"rate_limit\":\n84\t\t\tsuggestions = generateRateLimitSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n85\t\tcase \"retry_exceeded\":\n86\t\t\tsuggestions = generateRetryExceededSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n87\t\tdefault:\n88\t\t\t// For unknown or custom error types, provide generic suggestions\n89\t\t\tsuggestions = generateGenericValidationSuggestions(errorType, expected, actual, context)\n90\t\t}\n91\t\n92\t\t// Ensure we always return at least one suggestion\n93\t\tif len(suggestions) == 0 {\n94\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions, \"Review the validation error and check if the request/response meets expectations\")\n95\t\t}\n96\t\n97\t\treturn suggestions\n98\t}\n99\t\n100\t// =============================================================================\n101\t// ENHANCED STATUS CODE SUGGESTIONS\n102\t// =============================================================================\n103\t\n104\t// generateEnhancedStatusCodeSuggestions provides detailed suggestions for HTTP status code mismatches.\n105\t// This extends the basic status code suggestions with context-aware recommendations.\n106\tfunc generateEnhancedStatusCodeSuggestions(expected, actual interface{}, context string) []string {\n107\t\tactualCode, ok := actual.(int)\n108\t\tif !ok {\n109\t\t\treturn []string{\n110\t\t\t\t\"Verify the response format is correct\",\n111\t\t\t\t\"Ensure you're receiving an HTTP response with a status code\",\n112\t\t\t\t\"Check if the response is being parsed correctly\",\n113\t\t\t}\n114\t\t}\n115\t\n116\t\tvar suggestions []string\n117\t\n118\t\t// Get specific suggestions based on the actual status code\n119\t\tspecificSuggestions := getStatusCodeSpecificSuggestions(actualCode)\n120\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions, specificSuggestions...)\n121\t\n122\t\t// Add context-aware suggestions\n123\t\tif context != \"\" {\n124\t\t\tcontextLower := strings.ToLower(context)\n125\t\n126\t\t\t// Detect common patterns in context\n127\t\t\tif strings.Contains(contextLower, \"get\") && actualCode == 404 {\n128\t\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n129\t\t\t\t\t\"GET request returned 404 - verify the resource exists at the endpoint\",\n130\t\t\t\t\t\"Check if the endpoint path in your context is correct\",\n131\t\t\t\t)\n132\t\t\t}\n133\t\n134\t\t\tif strings.Contains(contextLower, \"post\") && actualCode == 400 {\n135\t\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n136\t\t\t\t\t\"POST request returned 400 - validate request body format\",\n137\t\t\t\t\t\"Ensure Content-Type header matches request body format\",\n138\t\t\t\t)\n139\t\t\t}\n140\t\n141\t\t\tif strings.Contains(contextLower, \"put\") || strings.Contains(contextLower, \"patch\") {\n142\t\t\t\tif actualCode == 404 {\n143\t\t\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n144\t\t\t\t\t\t\"UPDATE request returned 404 - resource may not exist yet\",\n145\t\t\t\t\t\t\"Consider using POST instead if creating a new resource\",\n146\t\t\t\t\t)\n147\t\t\t\t}\n148\t\t\t}\n149\t\n150\t\t\tif strings.Contains(contextLower, \"delete\") && actualCode == 404 {\n151\t\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n152\t\t\t\t\t\"DELETE request returned 404 - resource may already be deleted\",\n153\t\t\t\t\t\"Check if the resource was already removed\",\n154\t\t\t\t)\n155\t\t\t}\n156\t\n157\t\t\tif strings.Contains(contextLower, \"oauth\") || strings.Contains(contextLower, \"auth\") {\n158\t\t\t\tif actualCode == 401 {\n159\t\t\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n160\t\t\t\t\t\t\"OAuth-related request failed authentication\",\n161\t\t\t\t\t\t\"Verify access token is valid and not expired\",\n162\t\t\t\t\t\t\"Check token has required scopes for this resource\",\n163\t\t\t\t\t)\n164\t\t\t\t}\n165\t\t\t\tif actualCode == 403 {\n166\t\t\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n167\t\t\t\t\t\t\"OAuth token lacks required permissions\",\n168\t\t\t\t\t\t\"Verify token scopes include access to this resource\",\n169\t\t\t\t\t)\n170\t\t\t\t}\n171\t\t\t}\n172\t\t}\n173\t\n174\t\t// Add general debugging suggestions\n175\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n176\t\t\t\"Review API documentation for expected status codes\",\n177\t\t\t\"Test with a tool like curl to verify the API behavior\",\n178\t\t)\n179\t\n180\t\treturn suggestions\n181\t}\n182\t\n183\t// =============================================================================\n184\t// ENHANCED ERROR MESSAGE SUGGESTIONS\n185\t// =============================================================================\n186\t\n187\t// generateEnhancedErrorMessageSuggestions provides detailed suggestions for error message pattern mismatches.\n188\tfunc generateEnhancedErrorMessageSuggestions(expected, actual interface{}, context string) []string {\n189\t\texpectedStr, _ := expected.(string)\n190\t\tactualStr, _ := actual.(string)\n191\t\n192\t\texpectedLower := strings.ToLower(expectedStr)\n193\t\tactualLower := strings.ToLower(actualStr)\n194\t\n195\t\tvar suggestions []string\n196\t\n197\t\t// Token-related errors (check both expected and actual)\n198\t\tif strings.Contains(expectedLower, \"token\") || strings.Contains(actualLower, \"token\") {\n199\t\t\tif strings.Contains(actualLower, \"expired\") {\n200\t\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n201\t\t\t\t\t\"Token has expired - implement token refresh logic\",\n202\t\t\t\t\t\"Check token expiration time and refresh before \"unauthorized\") || strings.Contains(actualLower, \"forbidden\") {\n262\t\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n263\t\t\t\t\t\"Resource exists but access is denied\",\n264\t\t\t\t\t\"Check if you {\n269\t\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n270\t\t\t\t\t\"Resource-related error\",\n271\t\t\t\t\t\"Verify the resource ID or identifier is correct\",\n272\t\t\t\t\t\"Check if the resource exists and is accessible\",\n273\t\t\t\t\t\"Ensure proper authentication/authorization\",\n274\t\t\t\t)\n275\t\t\t}\n276\t\t}\n277\t\n278\t\t// Validation errors (check both expected and actual)\n279\t\tif strings.Contains(expectedLower, \"validation\") || strings.Contains(expectedLower, \"invalid\") ||\n280\t\t   strings.Contains(actualLower, \"validation\") || strings.Contains(actualLower, \"invalid\") {\n281\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n282\t\t\t\t\"Input validation failed\",\n283\t\t\t\t\"Review request body for missing required strings.Contains(actualLower, \"too many\") {\n318\t\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n319\t\t\t\t\t\"Too many requests - implement request throttling\",\n320\t\t\t\t\t\"Add request queuing and \"server\") || strings.Contains(expectedLower, \"internal\") ||\n339\t\t   strings.Contains(actualLower, \"server\") || strings.Contains(actualLower, \"internal\") {\n340\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n341\t\t\t\t\"Server error occurred\",\n342\t\t\t\t\"Check service status page for ongoing issues\",\n343\t\t\t\t\"Implement retry logic with exponential general suggestions\n358\t\tif len(suggestions) == 0 {\n359\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n360\t\t\t\t\"Review the error message for specific details\",\n361\t\t\t\t\"Check API documentation for this error type\",\n362\t\t\t\t\"Verify request parameters match requirements\",\n363\t\t\t\t\"Test with different parameter values\",\n364\t\t\t)\n365\t\t}\n366\t\n367\t\t// Add context-specific suggestions if context is provided\n368\t\tif context != \"\" {\n369\t\t\tcontextLower := strings.ToLower(context)\n370\t\t\tif strings.Contains(contextLower, \"oauth\") || scopes\",\n373\t\t\t\t)\n374\t\t\t}\n375\t\t\tif strings.Contains(contextLower, \"user\") || strings.Contains(contextLower, \"account\") {\n376\t\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n377\t\t\t\t\t\"User/account-related validation - verify user exists and has access\",\n378\t\t\t\t)\n379\t\t\t}\n380\t\t}\n381\t\n382\t\treturn suggestions\n383\t}\n384\t\n385\t// =============================================================================\n386\t// ENHANCED CONTENT TYPE SUGGESTIONS\n387\t// =============================================================================\n388\t\n389\t// generateEnhancedContentTypeSuggestions provides detailed suggestions for Content-Type mismatches.\n390\tfunc generateEnhancedContentTypeSuggestions(expected, actual interface{}, context string) []string {\n391\t\texpectedStr, _ := expected.(string)\n392\t\tactualStr, _ := actual.(string)\n393\t\n394\t\tvar suggestions []string\n395\t\n396\t\texpectedLower := strings.ToLower(expectedStr)\n397\t\tactualLower := strings.ToLower(actualStr)\n398\t\n399\t\t// JSON-specific suggestions\n400\t\tif strings.Contains(expectedLower, \"json\") {\n401\t\t\tif strings.Contains(actualLower, \"html\") {\n402\t\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n403\t\t\t\t\t\"Expected JSON but received HTML - endpoint may be returning an error page\",\n404\t\t\t\t\t\"Check if the API endpoint exists and is correct\",\n405\t\t\t\t\t\"Verify the request method (GET vs POST) is documentation\",\n410\t\t\t\t\t\"Verify Accept header includes 'application/json'\",\n411\t\t\t\t\t\"Some APIs require format query parameter (e.g., ?format=json)\",\n412\t\t\t\t)\n413\t\t\t} else if strings.Contains(actualLower, \"text\") {\n414\t\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n415\t\t\t\t\t\"Expected JSON but received plain text - endpoint may be misconfigured\",\n416\t\t\t\t\t\"Check if the API requires authentication for JSON responses\",\n417\t\t\t\t\t\"Verify the endpoint is not returning an error message\",\n418\t\t\t\t)\n419\t\t\t} else {\n420\t\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n421\t\t\t\t\t\"Expected JSON but received different format\",\n422\t\t\t\t\t\"Verify Accept header is set to 'application/json'\",\n423\t\t\t\t\t\"Check API documentation for strings.Contains(expectedLower, \"xml\") {\n431\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n432\t\t\t\t\"Expected XML but received different format\",\n433\t\t\t\t\"Verify Accept header is set to 'application/xml' or 'text/xml'\",\n434\t\t\t\t\"Check API documentation for XML-specific requirements\",\n435\t\t\t)\n436\t\t}\n437\t\n438\t\t// Form-specific suggestions\n439\t\tif strings.Contains(expectedLower, \"form\") || strings.Contains(expectedLower, \"urlencoded\") {\n440\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n441\t\t\t\t\"Expected form data but received different format\",\n442\t\t\t\t\"Set Content-Type to 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'\",\n443\t\t\t\t\"Ensure request body is properly formatted as key=value pairs\",\n444\t\t\t\t\"URL-encode special characters in form data\",\n445\t\t\t)\n446\t\t}\n447\t\n448\t\t// Multipart suggestions\n449\t\tif strings.Contains(expectedLower, \"multipart\") {\n450\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n451\t\t\t\t\"Expected multipart data but received different format\",\n452\t\t\t\t\"Set Content-Type to 'multipart/form-data' with boundary\",\n453\t\t\t\t\"Ensure multipart body is correctly formatted\",\n454\t\t\t\t\"Verify boundary parameter matches content\",\n455\t\t\t)\n456\t\t}\n457\t\n458\t\t// General content type suggestions\n459\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n460\t\t\t\"Verify Content-Type header matches request body format\",\n461\t\t\t\"Check if charset or boundary parameters are needed\",\n462\t\t\t\"Ensure the body is properly formatted for the content type\",\n463\t\t\t\"Review API documentation for required content type\",\n464\t\t)\n465\t\n466\t\t// Context-specific suggestions\n467\t\tif context != \"\" {\n468\t\t\tcontextLower := strings.ToLower(context)\n469\t\t\tif strings.Contains(contextLower, \"post\") || strings.Contains(contextLower, \"put\") {\n470\t\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n471\t\t\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"%s request - ensure Content-Type matches the data you're sending\", strings.ToUpper(strings.Split(context, \" \")[0])),\n472\t\t\t\t)\n473\t\t\t}\n474\t\t}\n475\t\n476\t\treturn suggestions\n477\t}\n478\t\n479\t// =============================================================================\n480\t// ENHANCED STATUS CODE RANGE SUGGESTIONS\n481\t// =============================================================================\n482\t\n483\t// generateEnhancedStatusCodeRangeSuggestions provides detailed suggestions for status code range mismatches.\n484\tfunc generateEnhancedStatusCodeRangeSuggestions(expected, actual interface{}, context string) []string {\n485\t\tactualCode, ok := actual.(int)\n486\t\tif !ok {\n487\t\t\treturn []string{\n488\t\t\t\t\"Verify the response format is correct\",\n489\t\t\t\t\"Ensure you're checking a valid HTTP status code\",\n490\t\t\t}\n491\t\t}\n492\t\n493\t\tvar suggestions []string\n494\t\n495\t\t// Categorize the actual status code\n496\t\tswitch {\n497\t\tcase actualCode >= 200 && actualCode < 300:\n498\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n499\t\t\t\t\"Received success code (2xx) but expected error range\",\n500\t\t\t\t\"The request succeeded - update test expectations if this is expected\",\n501\t\t\t\t\"Verify the test is checking for the correct response type\",\n502\t\t\t\t\"Check if the API behavior has changed\",\n503\t\t\t)\n504\t\n505\t\tcase actualCode >= 300 && actualCode < 400:\n506\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n507\t\t\t\t\"Received redirect code (3xx) but expected different range\",\n508\t\t\t\t\"Check if the API is redirecting to a different endpoint\",\n509\t\t\t\t\"Verify redirect handling in your HTTP client\",\n510\t\t\t\t\"Follow redirects if testing the final endpoint\",\n511\t\t\t)\n512\t\n513\t\tcase actualCode >= 400 && actualCode < 500:\n514\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n515\t\t\t\t\"Received client error code (4xx) but expected different range\",\n516\t\t\t\t\"Review request parameters for errors\",\n517\t\t\t\t\"Check authentication credentials\",\n518\t\t\t\t\"Verify the resource exists and is accessible\",\n519\t\t\t\t\"Ensure request format matches API expectations\",\n520\t\t\t)\n521\t\n522\t\tcase actualCode == 502:\n523\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n524\t\t\t\t\"Received Bad Gateway error - upstream server or gateway validate\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"strings\"\n)\n\n/*\nEnhanced Suggestion Generation for Validation Errors\n\nThis file provides comprehensive suggestion generation for all validation error types.\nIt extends the existing basic suggestion system with more detailed, actionable\nrecommendations for common failure scenarios.\n\nSuggestion Strategy:\n1. Error Type Detection: Identify the specific validation error type\n2. Context Analysis: Analyze the expected vs actual values to understand the mismatch\n3. Pattern Matching: Detect common failure patterns (e.g., expired tokens, missing fields)\n4. Actionable Recommendations: Provide specific steps to resolve the issue\n5. Progressive Detail: Start with most likely causes, then less common ones\n*/\n\n// =============================================================================\n// COMPREHENSIVE SUGGESTION GENERATOR\n// =============================================================================\n\n// GenerateComprehensiveSuggestions creates detailed, actionable suggestions for any validation error.\n// This is the main entry point for enhanced suggestion generation and provides comprehensive\n// recommendations based on error type, expected/actual values, and common failure patterns.\n//\n// Parameters:\n//   - errorType: The type of validation error (e.g., \"status_code\", \"error_message\", \"content_type\")\n//   - expected: The expected value (can be any type)\n//   - actual: The actual value received (can be any type)\n//   - context: Optional additional context about where/when the validation occurred\n//\n// Returns a slice of suggestion strings, ordered from most to least likely solution.\n//\n// Example usage:\n//\n//\tsuggestions := GenerateComprehensiveSuggestions(\"status_code\", 200, 404, \"GET /api/users/123\")\n//\t// Returns:\n//\t// [\"Verify the endpoint URL is correct\",\n//\t//  \"Check if the resource ID or identifier exists\",\n//\t//  \"Ensure the resource hasn't been deleted or moved\",\n//\t//  \"Review API versioning (URL path may have changed)\",\n//\t//  \"Check authentication credentials\"]\nfunc GenerateComprehensiveSuggestions(errorType string, expected, actual interface{}, context string) []string {\n\tvar suggestions []string\n\n\t// Normalize error type\n\tnormalizedType := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(errorType))\n\n\tswitch normalizedType {\n\tcase \"status_code\":\n\t\tsuggestions = generateEnhancedStatusCodeSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n\tcase \"error_message\", \"error_message_pattern\":\n\t\tsuggestions = generateEnhancedErrorMessageSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n\tcase \"content_type\":\n\t\tsuggestions = generateEnhancedContentTypeSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n\tcase \"status_code_range\":\n\t\tsuggestions = generateEnhancedStatusCodeRangeSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n\tcase \"cors_headers\":\n\t\tsuggestions = generateCORSSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n\tcase \"response_structure\":\n\t\tsuggestions = generateResponseStructureSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n\tcase \"response_body\":\n\t\tsuggestions = generateResponseBodySuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n\tcase \"response_encoding\":\n\t\tsuggestions = generateResponseEncodingSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n\tcase \"auth_headers\":\n\t\tsuggestions = generateAuthHeaderSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n\tcase \"custom_headers\":\n\t\tsuggestions = generateCustomHeaderSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n\tcase \"json_schema\":\n\t\tsuggestions = generateJSONSchemaSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n\tcase \"data_validation\", \"field_validation\":\n\t\tsuggestions = generateDataValidationSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n\tcase \"type_validation\":\n\t\tsuggestions = generateTypeValidationSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n\tcase \"timeout\":\n\t\tsuggestions = generateTimeoutSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n\tcase \"rate_limit\":\n\t\tsuggestions = generateRateLimitSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n\tcase \"retry_exceeded\":\n\t\tsuggestions = generateRetryExceededSuggestions(expected, actual, context)\n\tdefault:\n\t\t// For unknown or custom error types, provide generic suggestions\n\t\tsuggestions = generateGenericValidationSuggestions(errorType, expected, actual, context)\n\t}\n\n\t// Ensure we always return at least one suggestion\n\tif len(suggestions) == 0 {\n\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions, \"Review the validation error and check if the request/response meets expectations\")\n\t}\n\n\treturn suggestions\n}\n\n// =============================================================================\n// ENHANCED STATUS CODE SUGGESTIONS\n// =============================================================================\n\n// generateEnhancedStatusCodeSuggestions provides detailed suggestions for HTTP status code mismatches.\n// This extends the basic status code suggestions with context-aware recommendations.\nfunc generateEnhancedStatusCodeSuggestions(expected, actual interface{}, context string) []string {\n\tactualCode, ok := actual.(int)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn []string{\n\t\t\t\"Verify the response format is correct\",\n\t\t\t\"Ensure you're receiving an HTTP response with a status code\",\n\t\t\t\"Check if the response is being parsed correctly\",\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar suggestions []string\n\n\t// Get specific suggestions based on the actual status code\n\tspecificSuggestions := getStatusCodeSpecificSuggestions(actualCode)\n\tsuggestions = append(suggestions, specificSuggestions...)\n\n\t// Add context-aware suggestions\n\tif context != \"\" {\n\t\tcontextLower := strings.ToLower(context)\n\n\t\t// Detect common patterns in context\n\t\tif strings.Contains(contextLower, \"get\") && actualCode == 404 {\n\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n\t\t\t\t\"GET request returned 404 - verify the resource exists at the endpoint\",\n\t\t\t\t\"Check if the endpoint path in your context is correct\",\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif strings.Contains(contextLower, \"post\") && actualCode == 400 {\n\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n\t\t\t\t\"POST request returned 400 - validate request body format\",\n\t\t\t\t\"Ensure Content-Type header matches request body format\",\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif strings.Contains(contextLower, \"put\") || strings.Contains(contextLower, \"patch\") {\n\t\t\tif actualCode == 404 {\n\t\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n\t\t\t\t\t\"UPDATE request returned 404 - resource may not exist yet\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"Consider using POST instead if creating a new resource\",\n\t\t\t\t)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif strings.Contains(contextLower, \"delete\") && actualCode == 404 {\n\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n\t\t\t\t\"DELETE request returned 404 - resource may already be deleted\",\n\t\t\t\t\"Check if the resource was already removed\",\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif strings.Contains(contextLower, \"oauth\") || strings.Contains(contextLower, \"auth\") {\n\t\t\tif actualCode == 401 {\n\t\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n\t\t\t\t\t\"OAuth-related request failed authentication\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"Verify access token is valid and not expired\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"Check token has required scopes for this resource\",\n\t\t\t\t)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif actualCode == 403 {\n\t\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n\t\t\t\t\t\"OAuth token lacks required permissions\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"Verify token scopes include access to this resource\",\n\t\t\t\t)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Add general debugging suggestions\n\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n\t\t\"Review API documentation for expected status codes\",\n\t\t\"Test with a tool like curl to verify the API behavior\",\n\t)\n\n\treturn suggestions\n}\n\n// =============================================================================\n// ENHANCED ERROR MESSAGE SUGGESTIONS\n// =============================================================================\n\n// generateEnhancedErrorMessageSuggestions provides detailed suggestions for error message pattern mismatches.\nfunc generateEnhancedErrorMessageSuggestions(expected, actual interface{}, context string) []string {\n\texpectedStr, _ := expected.(string)\n\tactualStr, _ := actual.(string)\n\n\texpectedLower := strings.ToLower(expectedStr)\n\tactualLower := strings.ToLower(actualStr)\n\n\tvar suggestions []string\n\n\t// Token-related errors (check both expected and actual)\n\tif strings.Contains(expectedLower, \"token\") || strings.Contains(actualLower, \"token\") {\n\t\tif strings.Contains(actualLower, \"expired\") {\n\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n\t\t\t\t\"Token has expired - implement token refresh logic\",\n\t\t\t\t\"Check token expiration time and refresh before expiry\",\n\t\t\t\t\"Use refresh token to obtain new access token\",\n\t\t\t\t\"Consider implementing automatic token renewal\",\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} else if strings.Contains(actualLower, \"invalid\") {\n\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n\t\t\t\t\"Token is invalid - verify token format and structure\",\n\t\t\t\t\"Check if token is properly encoded (JWT, etc.)\",\n\t\t\t\t\"Ensure token hasn't been corrupted in transmission\",\n\t\t\t\t\"Verify token signature if using JWT\",\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} else if strings.Contains(actualLower, \"revoked\") {\n\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n\t\t\t\t\"Token has been revoked - obtain a new token\",\n\t\t\t\t\"Check if user permissions have changed\",\n\t\t\t\t\"Verify token hasn't been invalidated by security events\",\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n\t\t\t\t\"Token-related error detected\",\n\t\t\t\t\"Verify token is correctly formatted and valid\",\n\t\t\t\t\"Check token expiration and refresh if needed\",\n\t\t\t\t\"Ensure token has required scopes/permissions\",\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Authentication/Authorization errors (check both expected and actual)\n\tif strings.Contains(expectedLower, \"auth\") || strings.Contains(actualLower, \"auth\") ||\n\t   strings.Contains(actualLower, \"denied\") || strings.Contains(actualLower, \"forbidden\") {\n\t\tif strings.Contains(actualLower, \"denied\") || strings.Contains(actualLower, \"forbidden\") {\n\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n\t\t\t\t\"Authentication/authorization failed\",\n\t\t\t\t\"Verify your account has permission to access this resource\",\n\t\t\t\t\"Check if additional authorization scopes are required\",\n\t\t\t\t\"Review API key or token permissions\",\n\t\t\t\t\"Ensure user account is in good standing\",\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} else if strings.Contains(actualLower, \"invalid\") || strings.Contains(actualLower, \"failed\") {\n\t\t\tsuggestions = append(suggestions,\n\t\t\t\t\"Authentication credentials are {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"call_0d565cacb752406ca7260f51","type":"tool_result","content":"1\tpackage validate\n2\t\n3\t/*\n4\tPackage validate provides a standardized, extensible validation error format for HTTP API testing.\n5\t\n6\tThis package defines the ValidationError data structure, which offers a comprehensive, machine-readable\n7\tformat for representing validation failures across different types of API validations (HTTP status codes,\n8\terror message patterns, content types, response structures, CORS headers, and more).\n9\t\n10\t# Validation Error Format\n11\t\n12\tThe ValidationError struct is the core of this package's error reporting system. It follows these design\n13\tprinciples:\n14\t\n15\t  - Serializable: Full JSON marshaling/unmarshaling support via struct tags\n16\t  - Machine-readable: Clear field names suitable for automated processing and log aggregation\n17\t  - Human-readable: Descriptive messages with helpful suggestions for debugging\n18\t  - Extensible: Optional fields provide additional context without breaking existing code\n19\t\n20\t# Required vs Optional Fields\n21\t\n22\tRequired fields that must be set for every ValidationError:\n23\t  - ErrorType: The validation category (e.g., \"status_code\", \"error_message\", \"content_type\")\n24\t  - Message: A concise, human-readable description of the validation failure\n25\t\n26\tOptional fields that provide additional context:\n27\t  - Expected/Actual: The values that were expected and actually received\n28\t  - Context: Where/when the validation occurred (e.g., endpoint, operation type)\n29\t  - FieldName: Specific field where the error was found (e.g., in response body JSON)\n30\t  - Location: Position information (e.g., \"line 5\", \"field 'user.email'\")\n31\t  - RelatedFields: Other fields related to this error for additional context\n32\t  - PatternDetails: Information about regex pattern matching failures\n33\t  - RangeInfo: Range boundaries for range-based validations (e.g., \"4xx\", \"5xx\")\n34\t  - ValidationDetails: Additional validation-specific information as a list\n35\t  - ResponseSnippet: Truncated excerpt from the response for debugging\n36\t  - Suggestions: Actionable recommendations for resolving the error\n37\t\n38\t# Creating Validation Errors\n39\t\n40\tThis package provides several ways to create ValidationError instances:\n41\t\n42\t  1. Direct struct initialization: Create ValidationError directly for full control\n43\t  2. ValidationFormatter builder: Use the builder pattern for ergonomic, fluent construction\n44\t  3. Convenience functions: Use pre-built functions like FormatStatusCodeError for common cases\n45\t  4. Custom validation: Use FormatCustomValidationError with FormatOption for advanced scenarios\n46\t\n47\tExample usage:\n48\t\n49\t\t// Using the ValidationFormatter builder\n50\t\terr := NewValidationFormatter(\"status_code\").\n51\t\t\tWithExpected(200).\n52\t\t\tWithActual(404).\n53\t\t\tWithContext(\"GET /api/users/123\").\n54\t\t\tFormat()\n55\t\t// Output:\n56\t\t// status_code validation failed\n57\t\t//   Expected: 200 (OK)\n58\t\t//   Actual:   404 (Not Found)\n59\t\t//   Context:  GET /api/users/123\n60\t\t//   Suggestions:\n61\t\t//     - Verify the endpoint URL is correct\n62\t\t//     - Check if the resource ID or identifier exists\n63\t\n64\t\t// Using a convenience function\n65\t\terr := FormatStatusCodeError(200, 404, \"GET /api/users/123\")\n66\t\n67\t# Error Interface\n68\t\n69\tValidationError implements the error interface, producing detailed, multi-line error messages\n70\tthat include all relevant validation information. The Error() method formats the output\n71\twith expected/actual values, context, field information, and suggestions for resolution.\n72\t\n73\t# Serialization\n74\t\n75\tValidationError includes JSON struct tags for all fields, enabling easy serialization:\n76\t\n77\t\terr := ValidationError{ErrorType: \"status_code\", Message: \"test\"}\n78\t\tjsonBytes, _ := json.Marshal(err)\n79\t\t// Output: {\"error_type\":\"status_code\",\"message\":\"test\"}\n80\t\n81\tThe ToMap() method provides flexible map[string]interface{} conversion for dynamic\n82\tmanipulation before serialization.\n83\t\n84\t# Validation\n85\t\n86\tThe Validate() method checks that a ValidationError is properly structured with\n87\trequired fields populated. Use this to catch programming errors early:\n88\t\n89\t\terr := ValidationError{ErrorType: \"status_code\", Message: \"test\"}\n90\t\tif err := err.Validate(); err != nil {\n91\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"Invalid error structure: %v\", err)\n92\t\t}\n93\t*/\n94\t\n95\timport (\n96\t\t\"fmt\"\n97\t\t\"strings\"\n98\t)\n99\t\n100\t// =============================================================================\n101\t// HELPER TYPES\n102\t// =============================================================================\n103\t\n104\t// ValidationErrorData is a simplified, serialization-friendly version of ValidationError.\n105\t// It provides a consistent format for external communication and API responses.\n106\t// This type is designed to be easily marshaled to JSON and consumed by external systems.\n107\t//\n108\t// Relationship to ValidationError:\n109\t// - ValidationError is the internal, comprehensive error structure used by the validate package\n110\t// - ValidationErrorData is the external, simplified format returned to API clients\n111\t// - Use ToValidationErrorData() to convert ValidationError to ValidationErrorData\n112\t//\n113\t// # Required Fields\n114\t//\n115\t// The MessageType, ErrorType, and Message fields are required for all ValidationErrorData.\n116\t//\n117\t// # Optional Fields\n118\t//\n119\t// All other fields are optional and should be populated based on the specific validation scenario.\n120\t//\n121\t// Example usage:\n122\t//\n123\t//\tdata := ValidationErrorData{\n124\t//\t    MessageType:  \"validation_failed\",\n125\t//\t    ErrorType:    \"status_code\",\n126\t//\t    Message:      \"Expected status code 200 but got 404\",\n127\t//\t    Context:      \"GET /api/users/123\",\n128\t//\t    Expected:     200,\n129\t//\t    Actual:       404,\n130\t//\t    Suggestions:  []string{\"Check the endpoint URL\", \"Verify resource exists\"},\n131\t//\t}\n132\t//\tjsonBytes, _ := json.Marshal(data)\n133\ttype ValidationErrorData struct {\n134\t\t// MessageType is a fixed identifier for this type of error message.\n135\t\t// Always \"validation_failed\" for ValidationErrorData instances.\n136\t\t// This field allows clients to quickly identify the error category.\n137\t\tMessageType string `json:\"message_type\"`\n138\t\n139\t\t// ErrorType is the specific validation category that failed.\n140\t\t// Common values include: \"status_code\", \"error_message\", \"content_type\",\n141\t\t// \"status_code_range\", \"cors_headers\", \"response_structure\".\n142\t\t// Use the ErrorType* constants for type-safe error type specification.\n143\t\tErrorType string `json:\"error_type\"`\n144\t\n145\t\t// Message is a human-readable description of what went wrong.\n146\t\t// This should be a clear, actionable message that explains the validation failure.\n147\t\tMessage string `json:\"message\"`\n148\t\n149\t\t// Context provides additional information about where or when the validation occurred.\n150\t\t// Examples: \"GET /api/users/123\", \"OAuth token validation\", \"POST /api/orders\"\n151\t\tContext string `json:\"context,omitempty\"`\n152\t\n153\t\t// Expected contains the value that was expected during validation.\n154\t\t// Can be of any type: int, string, []int, etc.\n155\t\tExpected interface{} `json:\"expected,omitempty\"`\n156\t\n157\t\t// Actual contains the value that was actually received during validation.\n158\t\t// Can be of any type: int, string, []int, etc.\n159\t\tActual interface{} `json:\"actual,omitempty\"`\n160\t\n161\t\t// FieldName specifies the field where the error was found (e.g., \"error\", \"message\", \"detail\").\n162\t\t// This is particularly useful for error message validation in response bodies.\n163\t\tFieldName string `json:\"field_name,omitempty\"`\n164\t\n165\t\t// Location specifies where in the input the error occurred.\n166\t\t// Examples: \"line 5\", \"field 'user.email'\", \"position 123\", \"header 'Authorization'\"\n167\t\tLocation string `json:\"location,omitempty\"`\n168\t\n169\t\t// RelatedFields lists fields related to this error for additional context.\n170\t\t// Examples: [\"email\", \"email_confirmation\"], [\"access_token\", \"refresh_token\"]\n171\t\tRelatedFields []string `json:\"related_fields,omitempty\"`\n172\t\n173\t\t// PatternDetails contains information about pattern matching failures.\n174\t\t// Example: \"regex pattern 'invalid.*token' did not match\"\n175\t\tPatternDetails string `json:\"pattern_details,omitempty\"`\n176\t\n177\t\t// RangeInfo specifies range boundaries for range validation failures.\n178\t\t// Example: \"400-499 (Client Error)\", \"200-299 (Success)\"\n179\t\tRangeInfo string `json:\"range_info,omitempty\"`\n180\t\n181\t\t// ValidationDetails contains additional validation-specific information.\n182\t\t// This can include multiple details as a list of strings for comprehensive error reporting.\n183\t\tValidationDetails []string `json:\"validation_details,omitempty\"`\n184\t\n185\t\t// ResponseSnippet is a truncated excerpt from the response for debugging.\n186\t\t// This should be limited to a reasonable length (e.g., 200 characters) to keep\n187\t\t// error messages readable while providing useful context.\n188\t\tResponseSnippet string `json:\"response_snippet,omitempty\"`\n189\t\n190\t\t// Suggestions provides actionable recommendations for resolving the validation error.\n191\t\t// When provided, suggestions should be specific and actionable.\n192\t\tSuggestions []string `json:\"suggestions,omitempty\"`\n193\t}\n194\t\n195\t// Error implements the error interface for ValidationErrorData.\n196\t// It returns the Message field for compatibility with error handling patterns.\n197\t//\n198\t// Example usage:\n199\t//\n200\t//\tdata := ValidationErrorData{Message: \"Validation failed\"}\n201\t//\tlog.Printf(\"Error: %v\", data)\n202\tfunc (ve ValidationErrorData) Error() string {\n203\t\treturn ve.Message\n204\t}\n205\t\n206\t// ToValidationErrorData converts a ValidationError to ValidationErrorData format.\n207\t// This function creates a simplified, serialization-friendly version of the validation error\n208\t// suitable for external communication and API responses.\n209\t//\n210\t// The conversion maps ValidationError fields to ValidationErrorData fields,\n211\t// with the following special handling:\n212\t// - ErrorType is directly copied\n213\t// - Message is generated if empty\n214\t// - MessageType is always set to \"validation_failed\"\n215\t// - All other fields are preserved if present\n216\t//\n217\t// Parameters:\n218\t//   - ve: The ValidationError to convert\n219\t//\n220\t// Returns a ValidationErrorData instance with populated fields.\n221\t//\n222\t// Example usage:\n223\t//\n224\t//\tve := ValidationError{\n225\t//\t    ErrorType: \"status_code\",\n226\t//\t    Expected:  200,\n227\t//\t    Actual:    404,\n228\t//\t    Context:   \"GET /api/users\",\n229\t//\t}\n230\t//\tdata := ToValidationErrorData(ve)\n231\t//\t// data.MessageType = \"validation_failed\"\n232\t//\t// data.ErrorType = \"status_code\"\n233\t//\t// data.Context = \"GET /api/users\"\n234\tfunc ToValidationErrorData(ve ValidationError) ValidationErrorData {\n235\t\t// Generate message if not provided\n236\t\tmessage := ve.Message\n237\t\tif message == \"\" {\n238\t\t\t// Generate detailed message with expected/actual values\n239\t\t\tmessage = generateValidationMessage(ve.ErrorType, ve.Expected, ve.Actual)\n240\t\t}\n241\t\n242\t\tdata := ValidationErrorData{\n243\t\t\tMessageType:  \"validation_failed\",\n244\t\t\tErrorType:    ve.ErrorType,\n245\t\t\tMessage:      message,\n246\t\t\tContext:      ve.Context,\n247\t\t\tExpected:     ve.Expected,\n248\t\t\tActual:       ve.Actual,\n249\t\t\tFieldName:    ve.FieldName,\n250\t\t\tLocation:     ve.Location,\n251\t\t\tRelatedFields:     ve.RelatedFields,\n252\t\t\tPatternDetails:    ve.PatternDetails,\n253\t\t\tRangeInfo:         ve.RangeInfo,\n254\t\t\tValidationDetails: ve.ValidationDetails,\n255\t\t\tResponseSnippet:   ve.ResponseSnippet,\n256\t\t\tSuggestions:       ve.Suggestions,\n257\t\t}\n258\t\n259\t\treturn data\n260\t}\n261\t\n262\t// generateValidationMessage creates a detailed validation message with expected/actual values.\n263\tfunc generateValidationMessage(errorType string, expected, actual interface{}) string {\n264\t\tvar parts []string\n265\t\n266\t\t// Add expected value details\n267\t\tif expected != nil {\n268\t\t\tswitch exp := expected.(type) {\n269\t\t\tcase int:\n270\t\t\t\tparts = append(parts, fmt.Sprintf(\"Expected %d (%s)\", exp, getStatusCodeDescription(exp)))\n271\t\t\tcase []int:\n272\t\t\t\texpectedStr := \"one of [\"\n273\t\t\t\tfor i, code := range exp {\n274\t\t\t\t\tif i > 0 {\n275\t\t\t\t\t\texpectedStr += \", \"\n276\t\t\t\t\t}\n277\t\t\t\t\texpectedStr += fmt.Sprintf(\"%d (%s)\", code, getStatusCodeDescription(code))\n278\t\t\t\t}\n279\t\t\t\texpectedStr += \"]\"\n280\t\t\t\tparts = append(parts, expectedStr)\n281\t\t\tcase string:\n282\t\t\t\tparts = append(parts, fmt.Sprintf(\"Expected '%s'\", exp))\n283\t\t\tdefault:\n284\t\t\t\tparts = append(parts, fmt.Sprintf(\"Expected %v\", exp))\n285\t\t\t}\n286\t\t}\n287\t\n288\t\t// Add actual value details\n289\t\tif actual != nil {\n290\t\t\tswitch act := actual.(type) {\n291\t\t\tcase int:\n292\t\t\t\tparts = append(parts, fmt.Sprintf(\"but got %d (%s)\", act, getStatusCodeDescription(act)))\n293\t\t\tcase string:\n294\t\t\t\tif len(act) > 50 {\n295\t\t\t\t\tact = act[:50] + \"...\"\n296\t\t\t\t}\n297\t\t\t\tparts = append(parts, fmt.Sprintf(\"but got '%s'\", act))\n298\t\t\tdefault:\n299\t\t\t\tparts = append(parts, fmt.Sprintf(\"but got %v\", act))\n300\t\t\t}\n301\t\t}\n302\t\n303\t\t// Combine parts\n304\t\tif len(parts) > 0 {\n305\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%s validation failed: %s\", errorType, strings.Join(parts, \" \"))\n306\t\t}\n307\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%s validation failed\", errorType)\n308\t}\n309\t\n310\t// ValidationError is the core data structure for validation error representation.\n311\t// It provides a standardized format for validation errors across different\n312\t// validation types (status codes, error messages, content types, etc.).\n313\t//\n314\t// This structure is designed to be:\n315\t// - Serializable: Includes JSON tags for marshaling/unmarshaling\n316\t// - Machine-readable: Clear field names for automated processing\n317\t// - Human-readable: Descriptive messages for debugging\n318\t// - Extensible: Optional fields for additional context\n319\t//\n320\t// # Required Fields\n321\t//\n322\t// The Message and ErrorType fields are required for all validation errors.\n323\t//\n324\t// # Optional Fields\n325\t//\n326\t// All other fields are optional and should be populated based on the\n327\t// specific validation scenario.\n328\t//\n329\t// Example usage:\n330\t//\n331\t//\terr := ValidationError{\n332\t//\t    ErrorType: \"status_code_mismatch\",\n333\t//\t    Message:   \"Expected status code 200 but got 404\",\n334\t//\t    Expected:  200,\n335\t//\t    Actual:    404,\n336\t//\t    Context:   \"GET /api/users/123\",\n337\t//\t}\n338\t//\tjsonBytes, _ := json.Marshal(err)\n339\ttype ValidationError struct {\n340\t\t// ErrorType is the specific validation category that failed.\n341\t\t// This field identifies what kind of validation was performed and failed.\n342\t\t// Common values include: \"status_code\", \"error_message\", \"content_type\",\n343\t\t// \"status_code_range\", \"cors_headers\", \"response_structure\".\n344\t\t//\n345\t\t// This field is required for all validation errors.\n346\t\tErrorType string `json:\"error_type\"`\n347\t\n348\t\t// Message is a human-readable description of what went wrong.\n349\t\t// This should be a clear, actionable message that explains the validation failure.\n350\t\t// The message should be concise but informative enough for debugging.\n351\t\t//\n352\t\t// This field is required for all validation errors.\n353\t\tMessage string `json:\"message\"`\n354\t\n355\t\t// Context provides additional information about where or when the validation occurred.\n356\t\t// This can include endpoint names, operation types, or other contextual details.\n357\t\t// Examples: \"GET /api/users/123\", \"OAuth token validation\", \"POST /api/orders\"\n358\t\t// This field is optional and can be empty if no context is available.\n359\t\tContext string `json:\"context,omitempty\"`\n360\t\n361\t\t// Expected contains the value that was expected during validation.\n362\t\t// This field is optional and may not be relevant for all validation types.\n363\t\t// When present, it helps identify the discrepancy between expected and actual values.\n364\t\t// Can be of any type: int, string, []int, etc.\n365\t\tExpected interface{} `json:\"expected,omitempty\"`\n366\t\n367\t\t// Actual contains the value that was actually received during validation.\n368\t\t// This field is optional and may not be relevant for all validation types.\n369\t\t// When present, it shows the specific value that caused the validation failure.\n370\t\t// Can be of any type: int, string, []int, etc.\n371\t\tActual interface{} `json:\"actual,omitempty\"`\n372\t\n373\t\t// FieldName specifies the field where the error was found (e.g., \"error\", \"message\", \"detail\").\n374\t\t// This is particularly useful for error message validation in response bodies.\n375\t\t// This field is optional.\n376\t\tFieldName string `json:\"field_name,omitempty\"`\n377\t\n378\t\t// Location specifies where in the input the error occurred.\n379\t\t// Examples: \"line 5\", \"field 'user.email'\", \"position 123\", \"header 'Authorization'\"\n380\t\t// This field is optional.\n381\t\tLocation string `json:\"location,omitempty\"`\n382\t\n383\t\t// RelatedFields lists fields related to this error for additional context.\n384\t\t// Examples: [\"email\", \"email_confirmation\"], [\"access_token\", \"refresh_token\"]\n385\t\t// This field is optional.\n386\t\tRelatedFields []string `json:\"related_fields,omitempty\"`\n387\t\n388\t\t// PatternDetails contains information about pattern matching failures.\n389\t\t// This is useful when validating error messages against regex patterns.\n390\t\t// Example: \"regex pattern 'invalid.*token' did not match\"\n391\t\t// This field is optional.\n392\t\tPatternDetails string `json:\"pattern_details,omitempty\"`\n393\t\n394\t\t// RangeInfo specifies range boundaries for range validation failures.\n395\t\t// Example: \"400-499 (Client Error)\", \"200-299 (Success)\"\n396\t\t// This field is optional.\n397\t\tRangeInfo string `json:\"range_info,omitempty\"`\n398\t\n399\t\t// ValidationDetails contains additional validation-specific information.\n400\t\t// This can include multiple details as a list of strings for comprehensive error reporting.\n401\t\t// This field is optional.\n402\t\tValidationDetails []string `json:\"validation_details,omitempty\"`\n403\t\n404\t\t// ResponseSnippet is a truncated excerpt from the response for debugging.\n405\t\t// This should be limited to a reasonable length (e.g., 200 characters) to keep\n406\t\t// error messages readable while providing useful context.\n407\t\t// This field is optional.\n408\t\tResponseSnippet string `json:\"response_snippet,omitempty\"`\n409\t\n410\t\t// Suggestions provides actionable recommendations for resolving the validation error.\n411\t\t// This field is optional and contains hints or steps to fix the issue.\n412\t\t// When provided, suggestions should be specific and actionable.\n413\t\tSuggestions []string `json:\"suggestions,omitempty\"`\n414\t}\n415\t\n416\t// Error implements the error interface for ValidationError.\n417\t// It returns a detailed, multi-line error message that includes all relevant\n418\t// validation information for debugging and resolution.\n419\t//\n420\t// The output includes:\n421\t// - The validation type\n422\t// - Expected vs actual values\n423\t// - Context (if provided)\n424\t// - Field name (if provided)\n425\t// - Location (if provided)\n426\t// - Related fields (if provided)\n427\t// - Pattern details (if provided)\n428\t// - Range info (if provided)\n429\t// - Validation details (if provided)\n430\t// - Response snippet (if provided)\n431\t// - Suggestions for fixing the issue\n432\t//\n433\t// Example usage:\n434\t//\n435\t//\terr := ValidationError{\n436\t//\t    ErrorType: \"status_code\",\n437\t//\t    Message:   \"Expected 200 but got 404\",\n438\t//\t    Expected:  200,\n439\t//\t    Actual:    404,\n440\t//\t}\n441\t//\tlog.Printf(\"Validation failed: %v\", err)\n442\tfunc (ve ValidationError) Error() string {\n443\t\tvar b strings.Builder\n444\t\n445\t\t// Use the Message field as the first line if it's different from the default\n446\t\tif ve.Message != \"\" && !strings.HasPrefix(ve.Message, ve.ErrorType+\" validation failed\") {\n447\t\t\tb.WriteString(ve.Message)\n448\t\t\tb.WriteString(\"\\n\")\n449\t\t} else {\n450\t\t\tb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s validation failed\\n\", ve.ErrorType))\n451\t\t}\n452\t\n453\t\t// Expected vs Actual\n454\t\tif ve.Expected != nil || ve.Actual != nil {\n455\t\t\t// For status code validation, use \"Expected:\" and \"Received:\" labels\n456\t\t\tisStatusCode := ve.ErrorType == \"status_code\"\n457\t\n458\t\t\tswitch exp := ve.Expected.(type) {\n459\t\t\tcase int:\n460\t\t\t\tb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"  Expected: %d (%s)\\n\", exp, getStatusCodeDescription(exp)))\n461\t\t\tcase []int:\n462\t\t\t\tb.WriteString(\"  Expected: one of [\")\n463\t\t\t\tfor i, code := range exp {\n464\t\t\t\t\tif i > 0 {\n465\t\t\t\t\t\tb.WriteString(\", \")\n466\t\t\t\t\t}\n467\t\t\t\t\tb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%d (%s)\", code, getStatusCodeDescription(code)))\n468\t\t\t\t}\n469\t\t\t\tb.WriteString(\"]\\n\")\n470\t\t\tcase string:\n471\t\t\t\tb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"  Expected: %s\\n\", exp))\n472\t\t\tdefault:\n473\t\t\t\tb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"  Expected: %v\\n\", exp))\n474\t\t\t}\n475\t\n476\t\t\t// Actual value - use \"Received:\" for status code validation\n477\t\t\tswitch act := ve.Actual.(type) {\n478\t\t\tcase int:\n479\t\t\t\tif isStatusCode {\n480\t\t\t\t\tb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"  Received: %d (%s)\\n\", act, getStatusCodeDescription(act)))\n481\t\t\t\t} else {\n482\t\t\t\t\tb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"  Actual:   %d (%s)\\n\", act, getStatusCodeDescription(act)))\n483\t\t\t\t}\n484\t\t\tcase string:\n485\t\t\t\tif len(act) > 100 {\n486\t\t\t\t\tact = act[:100] + \"...\"\n487\t\t\t\t}\n488\t\t\t\tif isStatusCode {\n489\t\t\t\t\tb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"  Received: %s\\n\", act))\n490\t\t\t\t} else {\n491\t\t\t\t\tb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"  Actual:   %s\\n\", act))\n492\t\t\t\t}\n493\t\t\tdefault:\n494\t\t\t\tif isStatusCode {\n495\t\t\t\t\tb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"  Received: %v\\n\", act))\n496\t\t\t\t} else {\n497\t\t\t\t\tb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"  Actual:   %v\\n\", act))\n498\t\t\t\t}\n499\t\t\t}\n500\t\t}\n501\t\n502\t\t// Context - use \"Request:\" for status code validation\n503\t\tif ve.Context != \"\" {\n504\t\t\tif ve.ErrorType == \"status_code\" {\n505\t\t\t\tb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"  Request:  %s\\n\", ve.Context))\n506\t\t\t} else {\n507\t\t\t\tb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"  Context:  %s\\n\", ve.Context))\n508\t\t\t}\n509\t\t}\n510\t\n511\t\t// Field name\n512\t\tif ve.FieldName != \"\" {\n513\t\t\tb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"  Field:    %s\\n\", ve.FieldName))\n514\t\t}\n515\t\n516\t\t// Location\n517\t\tif ve.Location != \"\" {\n518\t\t\tb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"  Location: %s\\n\", ve.Location))\n519\t\t}\n520\t\n521\t\t// Related fields\n522\t\tif len(ve.RelatedFields) > 0 {\n523\t\t\tb.WriteString(\"  Related fields: [\")\n524\t\t\tfor i, field := range ve.RelatedFields {\n525\t\t\t\tif i > 0 {\n526\t\t\t\t\tb.WriteString(\", \")\n527\t\t\t\t}\n528\t\t\t\tb.WriteString(field)\n529\t\t\t}\n530\t\t\tb.WriteString(\"]\\n\")\n531\t\t}\n532\t\n533\t\t// Pattern details\n534\t\tif strings.TrimSpace(ve.PatternDetails) != \"\" {\n535\t\t\tb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"  Pattern:  %s\\n\", ve.PatternDetails))\n536\t\t}\n537\t\n538\t\t// Range info\n539\t\tif strings.TrimSpace(ve.RangeInfo) != \"\" {\n540\t\t\tb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"  Range:    %s\\n\", ve.RangeInfo))\n541\t\t}\n542\t\n543\t\t// Validation details\n544\t\tif len(ve.ValidationDetails) > 0 {\n545\t\t\tb.WriteString(\"  Details:\\n\")\n546\t\t\tfor _, detail := range ve.ValidationDetails {\n547\t\t\t\tb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"    - %s\\n\", detail))\n548\t\t\t}\n549\t\t}\n550\t\n551\t\t// Response snippet\n552\t\tif ve.ResponseSnippet != \"\" {\n553\t\t\tb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"  Response: %s\\n\", ve.ResponseSnippet))\n554\t\t}\n555\t\n556\t\t// Suggestions - format as \"Common causes:\" with numbered list\n557\t\tif len(ve.Suggestions) > 0 {\n558\t\t\tb.WriteString(\"  Common causes:\\n\")\n559\t\t\tfor i, suggestion := range ve.Suggestions {\n560\t\t\t\t// Don't add trailing newline after last suggestion\n561\t\t\t\tif i == len(ve.Suggestions)-1 {\n562\t\t\t\t\tb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"  %d. %s\", i+1, suggestion))\n563\t\t\t\t} else {\n564\t\t\t\t\tb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"  %d. %s\\n\", i+1, suggestion))\n565\t\t\t\t}\n566\t\t\t}\n567\t\t}\n568\t\n569\t\treturn b.String()\n570\t}\n571\t\n572\t// getStatusCodeDescription returns a human-readable description for a status code.\n573\t// This is a lightweight version for error formatting.\n574\tfunc getStatusCodeDescription(code int) string {\n575\t\tdescriptions := map[int]string{\n576\t\t\t100: \"Continue\", 101: \"Switching Protocols\", 102: \"Processing\",\n577\t\t\t200: \"OK\", 201: \"Created\", 202: \"Accepted\", 203: \"Non-Authoritative Information\",\n578\t\t\t204: \"No Content\", 205: \"Reset Content\", 206: \"Partial Content\",\n579\t\t\t300: \"Multiple Choices\", 301: \"Moved Permanently\", 302: \"Found\",\n580\t\t\t303: \"See Other\", 304: \"Not Modified\", 307: \"Temporary Redirect\",\n581\t\t\t308: \"Permanent Redirect\",\n582\t\t\t400: \"Bad Request\", 401: \"Unauthorized\", 402: \"Payment Required\",\n583\t\t\t403: \"Forbidden\", 404: \"Not Found\", 405: \"Method Not Allowed\",\n584\t\t\t406: \"Not Acceptable\", 407: \"Proxy Authentication Required\",\n585\t\t\t408: \"Request Timeout\", 409: \"Conflict\", 410: ve.Message,\n628\t\t}\n629\t\n630\t\tif ve.Context != \"\" {\n631\t\t\tresult[\"context\"] = ve.Context\n632\t\t}\n633\t\tif ve.Expected != nil {\n634\t\t\tresult[\"expected\"] = ve.Expected\n635\t\t}\n636\t\tif ve.Actual != nil {\n637\t\t\tresult[\"actual\"] = ve.Actual\n638\t\t}\n639\t\tif ve.FieldName != \"\" {\n640\t\t\tresult[\"field_name\"] =
